explanation: Hypothyroidism during pregnancy causes defective development and maturation of the growing baby leading to stunted growth (cretinism), mental retardation, low intelligence quotient, abnormal skin, deafmutism

question: Hypothyroidism and goitre is caused due to the deficiency of
explanation: Hypothyroidism occurs due to the deficiency of iodine. In this enlargement of thyroid gland occurs, as a consequence of distress development by the body to tope in whatever iodine is available in the diet and produce more thyroxine. Iodine is essential for thyroxine hormone production.

question: By which part of thyroid gland, $T_{3}$ and $T_{4}$ hormones are synthesised?
explanation: The follicle cells of thyroid gland synthesise two hormones, tetraiodothyronine or thyroxine $\left(\mathrm{T}_{4}\right)$ and tri-iodothyronine $\left(\mathrm{T}_{3}\right)$
subject: Biology

question: The thyroid gland is composed of
explanation: The thyroid gland is composed of follicles and stromal tissue. Thyroid gland is the largest endocrine gland composed of two lobes connected by a isthmus. It has some 3 million follicles, arranged in lobules (40 follicles in each lobule) and embedded in stromal tissue rich in blood capillaries. Each thyroid follicle is composed of follicular cells, enclosing a cavity.
subject: Biology

question: A flap of connective tissue which connects three lobes of thyroid is known as
explanation: Thin flap of connective tissue which connects two lobes of thyroid is known as Isthmus
subject: Biology

question: The thyroid gland is composed of lobes which are located on
explanation: The thyroid gland is composed of two lobes which are located on either side of the trachea
